referrals.name: RAICES — Refugee and Immigrant Center
referrals.note: Free and low-cost legal services for immigrant children, families, and refugees in South Texas.

referrals.name: ProBAR — South Texas Pro Bono Asylum Project
referrals.note: ABA project providing legal orientation and pro bono representation for detained individuals.

referrals.name: Florence Immigrant & Refugee Rights Project
referrals.note: Free legal services to adults and children in immigration custody in Arizona.

referrals.name: National Immigrant Justice Center
referrals.note: Legal services and advocacy for immigrants, asylum seekers, and refugees nationwide.

referrals.name: CLINIC — Catholic Legal Immigration Network
referrals.note: Supports a network of nonprofit immigration programs. Can connect you to local accredited representatives.

referrals.name: EOIR Immigration Court Hearing Information
referrals.note: Automated system for checking hearing dates and case status. Available in English and Spanish.

referrals.name: ICE Detainee Helpline
referrals.note: For reporting concerns about conditions of detention. Operated by ICE.

referrals.name: National Human Trafficking Hotline
referrals.note: Confidential 24/7 hotline for victims of human trafficking. Multilingual support available.

referrals.name: Report Immigration Scams (FTC)
referrals.note: FTC consumer complaint line. Report immigration scams, notario fraud, and unauthorized practice of law.

referrals.name: Americans for Immigrant Justice
referrals.note: Nonprofit law firm providing free legal services to immigrants in South Florida, including detained individuals at Krome.

referrals.name: Florida Immigrant Advocacy Center (now AI Justice)
referrals.note: Lucha Program serves survivors of human trafficking and domestic violence. Children's program for unaccompanied minors.

referrals.name: Catholic Charities of the Archdiocese of Miami
referrals.note: Immigration legal services including family petitions, DACA renewals, naturalization, and TPS applications.

referrals.name: Legal Aid Service of Broward County
referrals.note: Free legal assistance for low-income residents in Broward County, including immigration matters.

referrals.name: Haitian Refugee Center (Sant La)
referrals.note: Community-based organization serving Haitian immigrants in South Florida with legal referrals, social services, and advocacy.
